auth_note: Baseline (#1282) was LOGGED_IN and SUCCESS. For #1304 the page initially rendered the logged-in chat composer (input 'DeepSeek에 메시지 보내기' present, value confirmed) but the session token had expired server-side. After hard reload + typing prompt + Enter, the tab redirected to chat.deepseek.com/sign_in. Re-navigating to chat.deepseek.com root also redirects to /sign_in. No credentials available to re-login, so the warning DOM check could not be performed.
